description: Stable patient requesting routine medication refill; no acute complaints.

patient.name: Linda M., 50F
patient.chief_complaint: Routine refill of lisinopril and atorvastatin requested. Out of medication for 2 days, no symptoms. PCP unavailable until next week.

rubric_notes: ALL vitals normal. No acute complaint. Single resource (prescription) at most. Per RUBRIC Rule 5 ESI 5 (no resources, just discharge with prescription); could also be ESI 4 if a single resource is required (prescription = one resource). Care area: waiting or general. Tests overtriage tendency.
